description_long: This is a vintage-style vending machine with a rectangular, upright body and a rounded top section. The lower half is painted a worn red, while the upper half is white with visible rust and weathering, giving it an aged, industrial look. The front features a coin slot, a rectangular display or instruction panel, and a product retrieval slot near the base. The top of the machine has a circular illuminated sign, now faded, and the front bears the text 'JUGGER-NOG' and '10¢' in bold red letters. The sides are relatively plain but show additional text and heavy weathering, while the back is unadorned and heavily rusted. The overall appearance suggests it dispenses beverages and is designed to evoke nostalgia, possibly as a prop or decorative piece.
description: A weathered, vintage red-and-white vending machine with a circular illuminated sign and bold 'JUGGER-NOG' branding on the front. Features include a coin slot, display panel, and a product retrieval slot at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'JUGGER-NOG' branding, coin slot, display panel, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the machine's depth, rust, and the text 'ICE COLD' near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible features except heavy rust and weathering.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional faded text and visible weathering.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the front, above the product retrieval slot, appearing as a darkened or possibly glass-covered area.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is visible on the front, above the display panel, with a round shape and metallic finish. No bill acceptor or card reader is visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single button is visible on the front, below the coin slot, likely used for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the bottom front of the machine, with a small flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front displays 'JUGGER-NOG' in large red letters, '10¢' in a red circle, and additional faded text. The top has a circular illuminated sign with a faded logo. The left side reads 'ICE COLD' in red, and the right side has more faded text.
